project_type: Python research agent prototype with evaluation framework
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, no external dependencies (pure stdlib)
test_framework: pytest with class-based test organization in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run pytest, confirm 285+ tests pass with 0 failures
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.12.13 via pyenv. No external dependencies allowed (pure stdlib). Use http.server for API, not flask/fastapi.
contribution_requirements: All documentation in Arabic. Legitimate theft methodology must be followed (5.63+ numbering). Arabic template for thefts: ## X.XX من [SOURCE_NAME] / ### ما الذي أخذناه؟ / ### ما الذي لم نأخذه الآن؟ / ### ماذا أصبح عندنا؟
key_patterns: Pipeline at virtual_sia/runtime/pipeline/minimal_run.py with governance flags (use_anomaly_leverage, use_theory_leverage, use_productive_forgetting, use_identity_governance, use_paradigm_fork). Eval runners at virtual_sia/eval/runners/ using compare_conditions pattern. Task sets at virtual_sia/eval/task_sets/. Reports at virtual_sia/eval/reports/. Tests use class-based structure with helper functions.
directory_structure: virtual_sia/core/objects/ (domain objects), virtual_sia/runtime/ (runtime modules: pipeline, memory_os, concept_engine, economy_control, etc.), virtual_sia/eval/ (evaluation: runners, reports, task_sets, perturbations), tests/ (test files), *.md (documentation in Arabic)
